meaning: 阿纳多卢[土耳其的亚洲部分]
examples: Turkey's state-run Anadolu news agency late on Wednesday said some 30 military vehicles, including heavy armor, had moved to the border from Iskenderun base on the Mediterranean.
"We cannot shut down our doors to these people, " Erdogan said, according to Anadolu.
More than 33, 000 Syrians have fled to Turkey to escape the violence in their country, Anadolu reported.
The Anadolu news agency said Turkey delivered new toys Thursday to 4, 500 children living in a tent city in Nizip.
